summary: Jubilees retells the narratives of Genesis and Exodus with emphasis on covenant law, sacred time, and divine order.
historical_context: Written during the Second Temple period, Jubilees expands biblical history while emphasizing observance of divine commandments.

mirror_water_fire.mirror: Human history reflects the tension between obedience and rebellion.
mirror_water_fire.water: Divine law cleanses disorder through covenant instruction.
mirror_water_fire.fire: Sacred time transforms history into a structured narrative of redemption.
